Hindi Grammar.title: अव्यय (अविकारी शब्द)
Hindi Grammar.concepts: लिंग, वचन या काल से अप्रभावित रहने वाले शब्द; जैसे क्रियाविशेषण, विस्मयादिबोधक, और समुच्चयबोधक।

Hindi Grammar.title: वाक्य-विचार और विराम-चिह्न
Hindi Grammar.concepts: उद्देश्य-विधेय की सही संरचना, और लेखन में ठहराव स्पष्ट करने के लिए पूर्णविराम, अल्पविराम, प्रश्नवाचक चिह्नों का प्रयोग।

Hindi Grammar.title: मुहावरे और लोकोक्तियाँ
Hindi Grammar.concepts: भाषा को अधिक रोचक, तीक्ष्ण और अर्थपूर्ण बनाने हेतु विभिन्न लोकोक्तियों तथा मुहावरों का वाक्य प्रयोग।

Hindi Grammar.title: पत्र और संवाद लेखन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: औपचारिक (प्रधानाचार्य/प्रशासन को पत्र) व अनौपचारिक (मित्र/रिश्तेदारों को आमंत्रण) पत्रों का प्रारूप; तार्किक संवाद लेखन।

Hindi Grammar.title: अनुच्छेद और निबंध लेखन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: समसामयिक विषयों या वैचारिक संकेत बिंदुओं को ध्यान में रखकर क्रमबद्ध अर्थपूर्ण निबंध व अनुच्छेद की रचना।

Hindi Literature.concepts: बदलते वैश्विक परिदृश्य, तकनीकी विकास, और मानवीय मूल्यों पर उसके प्रभावों का विश्लेषण करता आधुनिक ज्ञानवर्धक निबंध।

Hindi Literature.title: सुभद्रा कुमारी चौहान
Hindi Literature.concepts: स्वतंत्रता संग्राम की प्रख्यात कवयित्री सुभद्रा कुमारी चौहान की जीवन-गाथा, वीर रस रचनाएँ, और राष्ट्रीय चेतना का बोध।

Hindi Literature.title: लोक कलाओं का वैभव
Hindi Literature.concepts: भारत के विभिन्न राज्यों की पारंपरिक लोक कलाओं (जैसे मधुबनी, वारली), हस्तशिल्प और सांस्कृतिक धरोहर पर आधारित कलात्मक निबंध।

Hindi Literature.title: रामानुजन: एक महान गणितज्ञ
Hindi Literature.concepts: भारत के महान गणितज्ञ श्रीनिवास रामानुजन की जीवनी; उनकी अद्भुत संख्या-साधना, संघर्ष, और वैश्विक स्तर पर उनके गणितीय योगदान।

English Grammar.title: Comprehensive Verb Tense Shifts
English Grammar.concepts: Mastering transitions across Past, Present, and Future Perfect Continuous tenses; handling condition clauses safely ($If / Unless$).

English Grammar.title: Voice & Speech Synthesis
English Grammar.concepts: Interchanging complex declarative, imperative, and interrogative sentences between Active/Passive and Direct/Indirect speech formats.

English Grammar.title: Non-Finite Verb Modals
English Grammar.concepts: Differentiating the structural syntax and behavior of Gerunds ($Verb+ing$ as noun), Infinitives ($To+Verb$), and Participles.

English Grammar.title: Advanced Clauses & Synthesis
English Grammar.concepts: Merging multiple single sentences into Compound and Complex structures using subordinate, relative, and noun clauses.

English Grammar.title: Phrasal Verbs & Idioms
English Grammar.concepts: Demystifying context-dependent phrasal verbs, standard prepositional collocations, and formatting precise figurative text lines.

English Grammar.title: Institutional Bulletins
English Grammar.concepts: Strict formatting blueprints for drafting institutional public notices, statutory warnings, and agenda minutes for display boards.

English Grammar.title: Formal Correspondence
English Grammar.concepts: Writing formal letters to public municipal editors, letters of complaint to corporate spaces, and professional email layouts.

English Grammar.title: Analytical Fact Reporting
English Grammar.concepts: Compiling structured argument essays, data-driven analytical reviews based on chart layouts, and presenting summary reports.

Hindi Grammar.title: वर्ण-विचार और संधि नियम
Hindi Grammar.concepts: स्वर और व्यंजन ध्वनियों का गहन वर्गीकरण; विसर्ग, व्यंजन, और स्वर संधि के जटिल विच्छेद नियमों का शुद्ध व्याकरणिक अभ्यास।

Hindi Grammar.title: उन्नत शब्द निर्माण
Hindi Grammar.concepts: तत्सम-तद्भव के उन्नत प्रयोग; संकर शब्द (दो भाषाओं के मेल), यौगिक, और योगरूढ़ शब्दों की पहचान; नए उपसर्ग-प्रत्यय नियम।

Hindi Grammar.title: पद-परिचय और कारक
Hindi Grammar.concepts: वाक्य में आए प्रत्येक शब्द (पद) का व्याकरणिक परिचय देना; संज्ञा, सर्वनाम, विशेषण, क्रिया की कारक विभक्तियों के साथ संगति।

Hindi Grammar.title: समास विग्रह एवं भेद
Hindi Grammar.concepts: समस्त पदों का विग्रह करने की वैज्ञानिक पद्धति; अव्ययीभाव, तत्पुरुष, कर्मधारय, द्विगु, द्वंद्व और बहुव्रीहि समास का विस्तृत विश्लेषण।

Hindi Grammar.title: अलंकार और रस परिचय
Hindi Grammar.concepts: काव्य सौंदर्य को बढ़ाने वाले प्रमुख शब्दालंकार (अनुप्रास, यमक) व अर्थालंकार (उपमा, रूपक, अतिशयोक्ति) के लक्षण; बुनियादी रसों का परिचय।

Hindi Grammar.title: वाक्य रूपांतरण और शुद्धि
Hindi Grammar.concepts: रचना के आधार पर वाक्य भेद (सरल, संयुक्त, मिश्र); अर्थ के आधार पर भेद, और वाक्यगत वर्तनी व व्याकरणिक अशुद्धियों का शोधन।

Hindi Grammar.title: उच्च स्तरीय शब्द भंडार
Hindi Grammar.concepts: प्रशासनिक एवं व्यावहारिक पर्यायवाची, विलोम शब्द, अनेक शब्दों के लिए एक शब्द, श्रुतिसमभिन्नार्थक शब्द, और मुहावरों का सटीक प्रयोग।

Hindi Grammar.title: प्रशासनिक व व्यावसायिक पत्र
Hindi Grammar.concepts: औपचारिक पत्र प्रारूप (संपादक को पत्र, शिकायती पत्र, व्यावसायिक ऑर्डर); अनौपचारिक पत्रों का विशिष्ट आमंत्रण प्रारूप।

Hindi Grammar.title: निबंध, आलेख व संवाद लेखन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: ज्वलंत सामाजिक, वैज्ञानिक व आर्थिक विषयों पर रूपरेखा सहित विस्तृत निबंध रचना; दो बुद्धजीवियों के मध्य गंभीर विषयों पर संवाद लेखन।

Maths.title: Number Systems
Maths.concepts: Irrational numbers, real numbers and their decimal expansions, representing real numbers on the number line, operations on real numbers, and laws of exponents for real numbers.

Maths.title: Polynomials
Maths.concepts: Polynomials in one variable, zeroes of a polynomial, Remainder Theorem, Factor Theorem, factorization of polynomials, and algebraic identities.

Maths.title: Coordinate Geometry
Maths.concepts: Cartesian system, coordinate planes, finding and plotting points in a plane, quadrant rules, and x/y-axis notations.

Maths.title: Linear Equations in Two Variables
Maths.concepts: Introduction to linear equations ($ax + by + c = 0$), finding solutions of a linear equation, and graphing linear equations in two variables.

Maths.title: Introduction to Euclid’s Geometry
Maths.concepts: Euclid’s definitions, axioms, and postulates; checking the equivalent versions of Euclid's fifth postulate.

Maths.title: Lines and Angles
Maths.concepts: Basic terms, intersecting and non-intersecting lines, pairs of angles, parallel lines and a transversal, and angle sum property of triangles.

Maths.title: Triangles
Maths.concepts: Congruence of triangles, criteria for congruence ($SAS, ASA, SSS, RHS$), properties of triangles, and inequalities in a triangle.

Maths.title: Quadrilaterals
Maths.concepts: Properties of a parallelogram, conditions for a quadrilateral to be a parallelogram, and the Mid-point Theorem.

Maths.title: Circles
Maths.concepts: Angle subtended by a chord at a point, perpendicular from the center to a chord, equal chords and their distances, angles subtended by an arc, and cyclic quadrilaterals.

Maths.title: Heron’s Formula
Maths.concepts: Calculating the area of a triangle using Heron's Formula ($s = \frac{a+b+c}{2}$ and $\text{Area} = \sqrt{s(s-a)(s-b)(s-c)}$) and its application in finding areas of quadrilaterals.

Maths.title: Surface Areas and Volumes
Maths.concepts: Surface area and volume of a right circular cylinder, right circular cone, and sphere/hemisphere.

Maths.title: Statistics
Maths.concepts: Collection and presentation of data, graphical representation of data (bar graphs, histograms, frequency polygons), and measures of central tendency.

Science.title: Matter in Our Surroundings
Science.concepts: Physical nature of matter, characteristics of particles, states of matter (solid, liquid, gas), effect of temperature and pressure on state changes, sublimation, and evaporation.

Science.title: Is Matter Around Us Pure?
Science.concepts: Elements, compounds, and mixtures; homogeneous vs heterogeneous mixtures; true solutions, suspensions, colloids; and separation techniques.

Science.title: Atoms and Molecules
Science.concepts: Laws of chemical combination, Dalton's atomic theory, atomic and molecular mass, writing chemical formulas, and the mole concept.

Science.title: Structure of the Atom
Science.concepts: Charged particles in matter, Thomson’s, Rutherford’s, and Bohr’s models of an atom; electron distribution (Bohr-Bury scheme), valency, atomic number, mass number, isotopes, and isobars.

Science.title: The Fundamental Unit of Life
Science.concepts: Cell as a basic unit of life; prokaryotic and eukaryotic cells; plasma membrane, cell wall, nucleus; cell organelles (mitochondria, plastids, ER, Golgi apparatus, lysosomes, vacuoles).

Science.title: Tissues
Science.concepts: Structure and functions of plant tissues (meristematic and permanent tissues) and animal tissues (epithelial, connective, muscular, and nervous tissues).

Science.title: Motion
Science.concepts: Distance and displacement, scalar/vector quantities, uniform/non-uniform motion, velocity, acceleration, uniform circular motion, and graphical equations of motion.

Science.title: Force and Laws of Motion
Science.concepts: Balanced and unbalanced forces, Newton's First Law of Motion (inertia and mass), Newton's Second Law ($F=ma$), momentum, and Newton's Third Law.

Science.title: Gravitation
Science.concepts: Universal Law of Gravitation, acceleration due to gravity ($g$), mass vs weight, free fall, thrust and pressure, Archimedes’ Principle, and buoyancy.

Science.title: Work and Energy
Science.concepts: Scientific concept of work, kinetic and potential energy, Law of Conservation of Energy, and rate of doing work (power).

Science.title: Sound
Science.concepts: Production and propagation of sound, wave nature of sound (frequency, amplitude, speed), speed of sound in mediums, reflection of sound, echo, SONAR, and the human ear.

Science.title: Improvement in Food Resources
Science.concepts: Crop yield improvement, crop variety management, crop production management, nutrient management, manure, fertilizers, storage of grains, animal husbandry (cattle, poultry, fish, bee-keeping).

Social Science: History.title: The French Revolution
Social Science: History.concepts: The Old Regime crisis, the outbreak of the revolution, the constitutional monarchy, the Reign of Terror, the rise of Napoleon, and the global legacy of liberty.

Social Science: History.title: Socialism in Europe & Russian Rev.
Social Science: History.concepts: The age of social change, liberals, radicals, and conservatives; the industrial society, the February Revolution in Petrograd, the October Revolution, and the creation of a Soviet state.

Social Science: History.title: Nazism and the Rise of Hitler
Social Science: History.concepts: The Weimar Republic crisis, Hitler’s rise to power, the Nazi ideology, the racial state, youth and women in Nazi Germany, and the Holocaust.

Social Science: History.title: Forest Society and Colonialism
Social Science: History.concepts: Deforestation trends under colonial rule, commercial forestry, rebellion in the forests (Bastar, Java), and the impact of timber trade on tribal communities.

Social Science: History.title: Pastoralists in the Modern World
Social Science: History.concepts: Pastoral nomads and their movements in mountains, plains, plateaus, and deserts; the impact of colonial laws on pastoral life, and how they coped with modern changes.

Social Science: Geography.title: India – Size and Location
Social Science: Geography.concepts: India's geographical location in the world, its size, the Standard Meridian, its strategic position on trade routes, and its neighboring countries.

Social Science: Geography.title: Physical Features of India
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Major physiographic divisions: The Himalayan Mountains, Northern Plains, Peninsular Plateau, Indian Desert, Coastal Plains, and Islands.

Social Science: Geography.title: Drainage
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Major river systems of India (Himalayan rivers vs Peninsular rivers), lakes, the economic role of rivers, and controlling river pollution.

Social Science: Geography.title: Climate
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Factors affecting India's climate (latitude, altitude, pressure, and winds), the Indian Monsoon mechanism, seasons, and distribution of rainfall.

Social Science: Geography.title: Natural Vegetation & Wildlife
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Factors affecting flora and fauna, vegetation types (Tropical Evergreen, Deciduous, Thorn, Montane, Mangrove), and wildlife conservation.

Social Science: Geography.title: Population
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Population size and distribution, population growth and processes of change (birth rate, death rate, migration), age composition, sex ratio, literacy, and National Population Policy.

Social Science: Political Science.title: What is Democracy? Why Democracy?
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Defining democracy, its core features, arguments for and against democracy, and the broader meaning of a democratic society.

Social Science: Political Science.title: Constitutional Design
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Democratic constitution in South Africa (Apartheid struggle), why we need a constitution, the making of the Indian Constitution, and its guiding values.

Social Science: Political Science.title: Electoral Politics
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Why elections are necessary, what makes an election democratic, India's system of elections (constituencies, voter lists, nomination, campaigns, and the Election Commission).

Social Science: Political Science.title: Working of Institutions
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: How major policy decisions are taken; the Parliament (Lok Sabha, Rajya Sabha), Political Executive (PM, Cabinet, President), and the Judiciary.

Social Science: Political Science.title: Democratic Rights
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Life without rights (Guantanamo Bay, Saudi Arabia), rights in a democracy, rights in the Indian Constitution (Fundamental Rights), and expanding the scope of rights.

Social Science: Economics.title: People as a Resource
Social Science: Economics.concepts: Human capital formation; economic activities by men and women; quality of population (education, health), and the challenge of unemployment.

Social Science: Economics.title: Poverty as a Challenge
Social Science: Economics.concepts: Poverty lines, estimates, vulnerable groups, interstate disparities, global poverty scenarios, causes of poverty, and anti-poverty measures.

Social Science: Economics.title: Food Security in India
Social Science: Economics.concepts: Dimensions of food security, food production trends, buffer stocks, Public Distribution System (PDS), fair price shops, and the role of cooperatives.

English Literature.title: Selected Prose Text (Chapters 1 to 11)
English Literature.concepts: Extracting core themes from texts like The Fun They Had, My Childhood, A Truly Beautiful Mind, Kathmandu, and If I Were You; character sketching, and vocabulary expansion.

English Literature.title: Selected Poems (Poems 1 to 8)
English Literature.concepts: Literary devices, rhyme schemes, and central ideas of poems including The Road Not Taken, Wind, Rain on the Roof, No Men Are Foreign, and On Killing a Tree.

English Literature.title: Core Supplementary Stories
English Literature.concepts: Analytical reading of supplementary fiction like The Lost Child, The Adventures of Toto, The Happy Prince, The Last Leaf, and The Beggar; evaluating narrative styles and underlying morals.

Hindi Literature.title: गद्य खंड (दो बैलों की कथा, ल्हासा की ओर, उपभोक्तावाद की संस्कृति, सांवले सपनों की याद, प्रेमचंद के फटे जूते आदि)
Hindi Literature.concepts: प्रेमचंद, राहुल सांकृत्यायन व अन्य लेखकों की रचनाओं का आलोचनात्मक अध्ययन; सामाजिक कुरीतियों, व्यंग्य विधा, और गद्य की भाषाई शैली का विश्लेषण।

Hindi Literature.title: काव्य खंड (कबीर की साखियाँ एवं सबद, वाख, सवैये, कैदी और कोकिला, बच्चे काम पर जा रहे हैं आदि)
Hindi Literature.concepts: कबीर, ललद्यद, रसखान, और माखनलाल चतुर्वेदी के काव्यों का पठन; भक्ति काल, राष्ट्रीय चेतना, और अलंकारों का काव्यात्मक सौंदर्य बोध।

Hindi Literature.title: पूरक पाठ्यपुस्तक (इस जल प्रलय में, मेरे संग की औरतें, रीढ़ की हड्डी)
Hindi Literature.concepts: आंचलिक विधा, संस्मरण, और सामाजिक-पारिवारिक ताने-बाने पर आधारित एकांकी का अध्ययन; चरित्र चित्रण और सामाजिक समस्याओं का बोध।

English Grammar.title: Tenses & Modals
English Grammar.concepts: Master functional use of all 12 tense structures in context; applying modal auxiliaries (can, could, should, must, might) for permissions and obligations.

English Grammar.title: Subject-Verb Concord
English Grammar.concepts: Verifying numerical and grammatical alignment between complex subjects and verbs; handling collective, indefinite, and compound subject rules.

English Grammar.title: Reported Speech Matrices
English Grammar.concepts: Transforming direct conversation lines into indirect text segments; handling statements, imperatives, questions, commands, and requests.

English Grammar.title: Gap Filling & Editing
English Grammar.concepts: Practical error correction, inserting correct prepositions/conjunctions, cloze tests, and re-arranging jumbled phrases into coherent syntax.

English Grammar.title: Descriptive Paragraphs
English Grammar.concepts: Structuring a 100-120 word analytical paragraph detailing a specific Person, Object, Event, or keeping a detailed personal Diary Entry.

English Grammar.title: Creative Story Writing
English Grammar.concepts: Formulating original short stories from a given visual or verbal prompt cue, organizing progressive plots, dialogues, and a final moral summary.

Hindi Grammar.title: शब्द निर्माण: उपसर्ग और प्रत्यय
Hindi Grammar.concepts: मूल शब्दों के प्रारंभ में जुड़ने वाले शब्दांश (उपसर्ग) और अंत में जुड़ने वाले शब्दांश (प्रत्यय) के माध्यम से नए शब्द बनाना और उनके अर्थ परिवर्तन को समझना।

Hindi Grammar.title: समास भेद एवं विग्रह
Hindi Grammar.concepts: दो या दो से अधिक शब्दों के संक्षिप्तीकरण की प्रक्रिया; तत्पुरुष, कर्मधारय, द्विगु, द्वंद्व, अव्ययीभाव और बहुव्रीहि समास का विस्तृत अध्ययन व विग्रह।

Hindi Grammar.title: अर्थ के आधार पर वाक्य भेद
Hindi Grammar.concepts: वाक्य के अर्थगत स्वरूप की पहचान और परस्पर रूपांतरण; विधानवाचक, निषेधवाचक, प्रश्नवाचक, विस्मयादिवाचक, आज्ञावाचक, इच्छावाचक, संदेहवाचक और संकेतवाचक वाक्य।

Hindi Grammar.title: अलंकार परिचय
Hindi Grammar.concepts: काव्य की सुंदरता बढ़ाने वाले तत्वों का अध्ययन; शब्दालंकार (अनुप्रास, यमक, श्लेष) और अर्थालंकार (उपमा, रूपक, उत्प्रेक्षा, अतिशयोक्ति, मानवीकरण) के लक्षण व उदाहरण।

Hindi Grammar.title: अपठित गद्यांश व काव्यांश
Hindi Grammar.concepts: अनजाने गद्य और पद्य खंडों को पढ़कर केंद्रीय भाव समझना, महत्वपूर्ण शीर्षकों का चुनाव करना, और पूछे गए विश्लेषणात्मक प्रश्नों के उत्तर सटीक रूप में लिखना।

Hindi Grammar.title: अनुच्छेद लेखन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: दिए गए समसामयिक, व्यावहारिक या वैचारिक संकेत बिंदुओं (Hints) के आधार पर तार्किक और क्रमबद्ध रूप से लगभग 120 शब्दों में सुगठित अनुच्छेद तैयार करना।

Hindi Grammar.title: पत्र लेखन (औपचारिक व अनौपचारिक)
Hindi Grammar.concepts: प्रशासनिक, व्यवसायिक, शिकायती अथवा प्रधानाचार्य को लिखे जाने वाले औपचारिक पत्र; तथा सगे-संबंधियों व मित्रों को लिखे जाने वाले अनौपचारिक पत्रों का अद्यतन प्रारूप।

Hindi Grammar.title: संवाद और लघु कथा लेखन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: दो व्यक्तियों के बीच किसी विषय पर यथार्थवादी, रोचक और सुगठित संवाद (Dialogue) लिखना; अथवा दी गई रूपरेखा के आधार पर शिक्षाप्रद लघु कथा बुनना।

Hindi Grammar.title: ईमेल व सूचना लेखन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: आधुनिक डिजिटल माध्यम के अनुसार औपचारिक ईमेल (E-mail) का प्रारूप तैयार करना; तथा विद्यालय या सार्वजनिक सूचना पट्ट हेतु औपचारिक सूचना (Notice) लेखन का अभ्यास।

Maths.title: Real Numbers
Maths.concepts: Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic; statements after reviewing work done earlier, illustrating and motivating through examples, and proofs of irrationality of $\sqrt{2}, \sqrt{3}, \sqrt{5}$.

Maths.title: Polynomials
Maths.concepts: Zeroes of a polynomial; finding the relationship between zeroes and coefficients of quadratic polynomials.

Maths.title: Pair of Linear Equations in Two Variables
Maths.concepts: Pair of linear equations in two variables and graphical method of their solution, consistency/inconsistency; algebraic conditions for number of solutions. Solution by substitution and elimination.

Maths.title: Quadratic Equations
Maths.concepts: Standard form of a quadratic equation $ax^2 + bx + c = 0$, $(a \neq 0)$. Solutions of quadratic equations (only real roots) by factorization and by using the quadratic formula; relationship between discriminant and nature of roots.

Maths.title: Arithmetic Progressions
Maths.concepts: Motivation for studying Arithmetic Progression, derivation of the $n$-th term and sum of the first $n$ terms of A.P. and their application in solving daily life problems.

Maths.title: Triangles
Maths.concepts: Definitions, examples, and counterexamples of similar triangles. Proofs and applications of the Basic Proportionality Theorem and criteria for similarity of triangles ($AAA, SAS, SSS$).

Maths.title: Coordinate Geometry
Maths.concepts: Review of concepts of coordinate geometry, graphs of linear equations; calculating lengths using the Distance formula and Section formula (internal division).

Maths.title: Introduction to Trigonometry
Maths.concepts: Trigonometric ratios of an acute angle of a right-angled triangle. Values of the trigonometric ratios of $0^\circ, 30^\circ, 45^\circ, 60^\circ, 90^\circ$; relationships between the ratios and proving the identity $\sin^2 A + \cos^2 A = 1$.

Maths.title: Some Applications of Trigonometry
Maths.concepts: Heights and Distances: Angle of elevation, Angle of depression. Simple problems on heights and distances involving not more than two right triangles where angles are restricted to $30^\circ, 45^\circ, 60^\circ$.

Maths.title: Circles
Maths.concepts: Tangents to a circle at a point of contact. Proving that the tangent is perpendicular to the radius through the point of contact, and that lengths of tangents drawn from an external point to a circle are equal.

Maths.title: Areas Related to Circles
Maths.concepts: Area of sectors and segments of a circle. Problems based on areas and perimeter/circumference of circles, restricting central angles to $60^\circ, 90^\circ, 120^\circ$.

Maths.title: Surface Areas and Volumes
Maths.concepts: Surface areas and volumes of combinations of any two of the following: cubes, cuboids, spheres, hemispheres, and right circular cylinders/cones.

Maths.title: Statistics
Maths.concepts: Calculating the Mean, Median, and Mode of grouped data arrays. Finding Mean using the Direct method and the Assumed Mean method.

Maths.title: Probability
Maths.concepts: Classical definition of probability; resolving simple situational problems on finding the probability of an event.

Science.title: Chemical Reactions and Equations
Science.concepts: Chemical equations, balancing equations, and implications. Types of chemical reactions: combination, decomposition, displacement, double displacement, precipitation, endothermic/exothermic reactions, oxidation, and reduction.

Science.title: Acids, Bases and Salts
Science.concepts: General chemical properties, examples, and uses. Concept of the pH scale ($0-14$) and its importance in everyday life; preparation and uses of Sodium Hydroxide, Bleaching powder, Baking soda, Washing soda, and Plaster of Paris.

Science.title: Metals and Non-Metals
Science.concepts: Physical and chemical properties of metals and non-metals; reactivity series. Formation and properties of ionic compounds, basic metallurgical processes, corrosion, and its prevention.

Science.title: Carbon and its Compounds
Science.concepts: Covalent bonding in carbon compounds; versatile nature of carbon and homologous series. Nomenclature of carbon compounds containing functional groups, saturated vs unsaturated hydrocarbons, chemical properties, and soaps/detergents.

Science.title: Life Processes
Science.concepts: Basic concepts of nutrition, respiration, transport, and excretion in plants and animals necessary to sustain life.

Science.title: Control and Coordination
Science.concepts: Tropic movements in plants; introduction of plant hormones. Control and coordination in animals: nervous system, voluntary, involuntary, reflex action, and animal hormones.

Science.title: How do Organisms Reproduce?
Science.concepts: Modes of reproduction in animals and plants (asexual and sexual). Reproductive health: family planning methods, safe sex protocols, childbearing, and women's health parameters.

Science.title: Heredity
Science.concepts: Core principles of heredity; Mendel’s contribution and laws for the inheritance of traits, alongside sex determination tracking.

Science.title: Light – Reflection and Refraction
Science.concepts: Reflection of light by curved surfaces; images formed by spherical mirrors, center of curvature, mirror formula, and magnification. Laws of refraction, refractive index, lens formula, and power of a lens.

Science.title: The Human Eye and the Colourful World
Science.concepts: Refraction of light through a prism, dispersion of light, scattering of light, and natural phenomena. Vision defects (Myopia, Hypermetropia, Presbyopia) and their structural corrections.

Science.title: Electricity
Science.concepts: Electric current, potential difference, Ohm's law, resistance, and resistivity. Series and parallel combinations of resistors and practical applications; heating effects of electric current and electric power interrelations.

Science.title: Magnetic Effects of Electric Current
Science.concepts: Magnetic fields, field lines, and fields due to current-carrying straight conductors, loops, and solenoids. Force on current-carrying conductors, Fleming's Left-Hand Rule, electric motors, electromagnetic induction, and Fleming's Right-Hand Rule.

Science.title: Our Environment
Science.concepts: Ecosystem components, food chains, and webs; analyzing environmental issues including ozone layer depletion, waste production, and biodegradable vs non-biodegradable solutions.

Social Science: History.title: The Rise of Nationalism in Europe
Social Science: History.concepts: The French Revolution and the idea of the nation; the making of nationalism in Europe, revolutions (1830-1848), unification of Germany/Italy, and Imperialism.

Social Science: History.title: Nationalism in India
Social Science: History.concepts: The First World War, Khilafat, and Non-Cooperation movements; differing strands within movements, civil disobedience phases, and the sense of collective belonging.

Social Science: History.title: The Making of a Global World
Social Science: History.concepts: Pre-modern world to Conquest, Disease, and Trade evaluated in boards. The remaining subtopics (19th-century economy to Bretton Woods) are assessed through projects.

Social Science: History.title: The Age of Industrialisation
Social Science: History.concepts: The pre-industrial era, the coming up of factories, industrial growth patterns, and the market for goods (evaluated through periodic/internal metrics).

Social Science: History.title: Print Culture and the Modern World
Social Science: History.concepts: The first printed books, expansion of print into Europe, print revolution impact, public debates, India and print development, and histories of censorship.

Social Science: Geography.title: Resources and Development
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Types and development of resources, resource planning in India, land resources, land degradation, soil classification, soil erosion, and conservation.

Social Science: Geography.title: Forest and Wildlife Resources
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Biodiversity profiles, conservation of forest and wildlife networks in India, categories and distribution of forests, and community conservation.

Social Science: Geography.title: Water Resources
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Water scarcity indices, multi-purpose river valley projects, integrated water resource management, and rainwater harvesting models.

Social Science: Geography.title: Agriculture
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Types of farming, cropping patterns, major crops across states, technological and institutional agricultural reforms, and food security.

Social Science: Geography.title: Minerals and Energy Resources
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Occurrences of minerals, ferrous/non-ferrous classifications, non-metallic minerals, conservation lines, and conventional vs non-conventional energy resources.

Social Science: Geography.title: Manufacturing Industries
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Importance of manufacturing, industrial localization parameters, agro-based vs mineral-based industries, industrial pollution, and environmental mitigation.

Social Science: Geography.title: Lifelines of National Economy
Social Science: Geography.concepts: Evaluated exclusively for map pointing board parameters covering major seaports, international airports, and geographic transit lines.

Social Science: Political Science.title: Power Sharing
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Case studies of Belgium and Sri Lanka; analyzing why power sharing is desirable and detailing operational forms of power sharing.

Social Science: Political Science.title: Federalism
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Defining federalism, structural elements making India a federal nation, how federalism is practiced, and decentralization models (Panchayats/Municipalities).

Social Science: Political Science.title: Gender, Religion and Caste
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Gender and politics (women's representation), religion, communalism and politics (secular state setups), and the dual dynamics of caste in politics.

Social Science: Political Science.title: Political Parties
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Purpose, meaning, and functions of political parties; national vs state parties, challenges to political parties, and structural party reforms.

Social Science: Political Science.title: Outcomes of Democracy
Social Science: Political Science.concepts: Assessing democracy: accountable, responsive, and legitimate governance; economic growth, reduction of inequality, accommodation of diversity, and individual freedom.

Social Science: Economics.title: Development
Social Science: Economics.concepts: Developmental goals and variations, national income indicators, comparing countries/states via Per Capita Income, public utilities, and sustainability metrics.

Social Science: Economics.title: Sectors of the Indian Economy
Social Science: Economics.concepts: Categorizing Primary, Secondary, and Tertiary sectors in India; historical sector shifts, Organized vs Unorganized labor divisions, and Public vs Private ownership.

Social Science: Economics.title: Money and Credit
Social Science: Economics.concepts: Money as a medium of exchange, modern currency formats, banking operations, terms of credit, formal vs informal sector credit lines, and Self-Help Groups (SHGs).

Social Science: Economics.title: Globalisation & Indian Economy
Social Science: Economics.concepts: Interlinking production across borders, multinational corporations (MNCs), foreign trade controls, defining globalization drivers, WTO, and fair globalization struggles.

Social Science: Economics.title: Consumer Rights
Social Science: Economics.concepts: Handled through project portfolios targeting market exploitation cases, consumer awareness movements, and the consumer court system (COPRA).

English Literature.title: Selected Chapters (Chapters 1 to 9)
English Literature.concepts: Comprehensive text reading: A Letter to God, Nelson Mandela, Two Stories about Flying, Diary of Anne Frank, Glimpses of India, Mijbil the Otter, Madam Rides the Bus, Sermon at Benares, The Proposal.

English Literature.title: Selected Poems (Poems 1 to 10)
English Literature.concepts: Structural and thematic analysis of poems: Dust of Snow, Fire and Ice, Tiger in the Zoo, How to Tell Wild Animals, The Ball Poem, Amanda!, Custard the Dragon, For Anne Gregory.

English Literature.title: Core Supplementary Stories
English Literature.concepts: Evaluating narrative styles: A Triumph of Surgery, The Thief's Story, The Midnight Visitor, A Question of Trust, Footprints without Feet, Making of a Scientist, The Necklace, Bholi, The Book That Saved the Earth.

Hindi Literature.title: गद्य खंड (नेताजी का चश्मा, बालगोबिन भगत, लखनवी अंदाज़, एक कहानी यह भी, नौबतखाने में इबादत, संस्कृति)
Hindi Literature.concepts: प्रसिद्ध कहानीकारों के गद्य खंड का सघन अध्ययन; व्यंग्य विधा, चरित्र चित्रण, मानवीय मूल्यों और संस्कृति का भाषाई विश्लेषण।

Hindi Literature.title: काव्य खंड (सूरदास के पद, तुलसीदास का राम-लक्ष्मण-परशुराम संवाद, आत्मकथ्य, उत्साह-अट नहीं रही है, यह दंतुरित मुस्कान-फसल, संगतकार)
Hindi Literature.concepts: सूरदास, तुलसीदास, जयशंकर प्रसाद, और निराला की रचनाओं का पठन; ब्रज व अवधि भाषा शैली, छंद योजना, रस और अलंकारों का काव्यात्मक सौंदर्य बोध।

Hindi Literature.title: पूरक पाठ्यपुस्तक (माता का अंचल, साना-साना हाथ जोड़ि, मैं क्यों लिखता हूँ)
Hindi Literature.concepts: आंचलिक परिवेश, यात्रा वृतांत और आत्मचिंतन परक गद्य विधाओं का विस्तृत अध्ययन; देशज शब्दों का प्रयोग और सामाजिक-सांस्कृतिक चेतना।

English Grammar.title: Tenses & Determiners
English Grammar.concepts: Mastering all 12 structural tense timelines within text sequences; correct contextual placement of definite and indefinite determiners.

English Grammar.title: Modals & Subject Concord
English Grammar.concepts: Applying modal auxiliaries (can, could, should, must, may) based on context; enforcing rigorous Subject-Verb Agreement alignments.

English Grammar.title: Reported Speech Syntax
English Grammar.concepts: Transforming conversation exchanges to indirect reporting formatting, focusing on Commands, Requests, Statements, and Questions.

English Grammar.title: Error Omission & Cloze Tasks
English Grammar.concepts: Contextual error detection, editing structural slips, identifying missing parts of speech, and sentence transformation arrays.

English Grammar.title: Formal Correspondence
English Grammar.concepts: Structuring 100-120 word official formal letters: Letters of Complaint (Business/Civic), Letters of Inquiry, Placing Orders, or Letters to Editors.

English Grammar.title: Analytical Paragraphs
English Grammar.concepts: Composing evidence-based analytical prose text paragraphs interpreting data from line graphs, pie charts, maps, or prompt matrices.

Hindi Grammar.title: रचना के आधार पर वाक्य भेद
Hindi Grammar.concepts: वाक्यों की संरचना और पारस्परिक रूपांतरण; सरल वाक्य, संयुक्त वाक्य और मिश्र वाक्यों की पहचान व उपवाक्य भेद (संज्ञा, विशेषण, क्रियाविशेषण)।

Hindi Grammar.title: वाच्य विधान एवं परिवर्तन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: क्रिया के प्रयोग रूप का परिचय; कर्तृवाच्य, कर्मवाच्य और भाववाच्य की पहचान तथा एक वाच्य से दूसरे वाच्य में व्याकरणिक परिवर्तन का अभ्यास।

Hindi Grammar.title: पद-परिचय
Hindi Grammar.concepts: वाक्य में प्रयुक्त प्रत्येक पद का पूर्ण व्याकरणिक परिचय देना; संज्ञा, सर्वनाम, विशेषण, क्रिया, अव्यय के भेद, लिंग, वचन, काल और कारक संबंध स्पष्ट करना।

Hindi Grammar.title: अलंकार निरूपण
Hindi Grammar.concepts: काव्यात्मक भाषा सौंदर्य बढ़ाने वाले तत्वों का अध्ययन; शब्दालंकार (अनुप्रास, यमक, श्लेष) और अर्थालंकार (उपमा, रूपक, उत्प्रेक्षा, अतिशयोक्ति, मानवीकरण) के व्यावहारिक लक्षण।

Hindi Grammar.title: संकेत बिंदुओं पर अनुच्छेद
Hindi Grammar.concepts: व्यावहारिक, सामाजिक, अथवा राष्ट्रीय महत्व के विषयों पर दिए गए संकेत बिंदुओं (Hints) के आधार पर तार्किक रूप से लगभग 120 शब्दों में सुगठित अनुच्छेद लेखन।

Hindi Grammar.title: औपचारिक व अनौपचारिक पत्र
Hindi Grammar.concepts: व्यवसायिक, कार्यालयी, शिकायती पत्र प्रारूप (औपचारिक); तथा सगे-संबंधियों व मित्रों को लिखे जाने वाले आमंत्रण, सांत्वना व शुभकामना पत्र (अनौपचारिक) का मानक प्रारूप।

Hindi Grammar.title: स्ववृत्त व ईमेल लेखन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: किसी रोज़गार या पद हेतु एक संक्षिप्त और सुगठित स्ववृत्त (Resume/CV) निर्माण; अथवा आधुनिक सूचना तकनीक के अनुरूप डिजिटल औपचारिक ईमेल लेखन का अभ्यास।

Hindi Grammar.title: विज्ञापन एवं संदेश लेखन
Hindi Grammar.concepts: किसी उत्पाद या सेवा के प्रचार-प्रसार हेतु आकर्षक, कलात्मक और संक्षिप्त विज्ञापन (Advertisement) तैयार करना; अथवा विभिन्न पर्वों/अवसरों पर भेजे जाने वाले शुभकामना संदेश लेखन।

Maths.title: Sets
Maths.concepts: Sets and representations, empty, finite, infinite, and equal sets; subsets of real intervals, Venn diagrams, union, intersection, and complements.

Maths.title: Relations & Functions
Maths.concepts: Ordered pairs, Cartesian product of sets, domain, co-domain, and range of relations; real-valued functions (modulus, signum, logarithmic) and their graphs.

Maths.title: Trigonometric Functions
Maths.concepts: Radian/degree conversions, unit circle functions, identity proofs, signs of functions, domain/range graphs, and compounding angle identities ($\sin 2x, \cos 3x$).

Maths.title: Complex Numbers & Quadratic Eq.
Maths.concepts: Need for complex elements ($\sqrt{-1}$), algebraic properties of complex numbers, Argand plane mapping, and solving quadratic equations with complex roots.

Maths.title: Linear Inequalities
Maths.concepts: Algebraic solutions of linear inequalities in one variable and graphical representations on the number line framework.

Maths.title: Permutations & Combinations
Maths.concepts: Fundamental principle of counting, factorial notations ($n!$), derivation and applications of permutations ($^nP_r$) and combinations ($^nC_r$).

Maths.title: Binomial Theorem
Maths.concepts: Historical context, statement and proof of the binomial theorem for positive integral indices, Pascal's triangle, and expansion layouts.

Maths.title: Sequence and Series
Maths.concepts: Arithmetic Progression (Mean updates), Geometric Progression (G.P.), general terms, sum of $n$ terms of a G.P., infinite G.P. sums, and A.M.-G.M. relationships.

Maths.title: Straight Lines
Maths.concepts: Slope of a line, angle between two lines, point-slope form, slope-intercept form, two-point intercept allocations, and computing distance from a point to a line.

Maths.title: Conic Sections
Maths.concepts: Sections of a cone: circles, ellipses, parabolas, and hyperbolas; derivation of standard equations and analyzing their geometric properties.

Maths.title: Intro to 3D Geometry
Maths.concepts: Coordinate axes and coordinate planes across 3D space, coordinates of localized points, and the 3D distance evaluation formula.

Maths.title: Limits and Derivatives
Maths.concepts: Intuitive idea of limits, limits of polynomials, rational, and trigonometric expressions; first principle definitions of derivatives, and product/quotient rules.

Maths.title: Statistics
Maths.concepts: Measures of dispersion: calculating range, mean deviation, variance, and standard deviation of ungrouped and grouped frequency data metrics.

Maths.title: Probability
Maths.concepts: Random experiments, outcomes, event subsets, exhaustive/mutually exclusive events, and axiomatic set-theoretic probability rules.

Physics.title: Units and Measurements
Physics.concepts: International SI metrics, fundamental and derived units, significant figures, dimensional formulas, and applications of dimensional analysis.

Physics.title: Motion in a Straight Line
Physics.concepts: Frame of reference, uniform vs non-uniform motion, instantaneous velocity, kinematic graphs, and deriving equations for uniformly accelerated motion.

Physics.title: Motion in a Plane
Physics.concepts: Scalar and vector properties, unit vectors, resolution of vectors, dot and cross products; projectile motion kinematics, and uniform circular motion.

Physics.title: Laws of Motion
Physics.concepts: Inertia frameworks, Newton's three laws of motion, momentum, impulse, conservation of linear momentum, equilibrium, static/kinetic friction, and banked road curves.

Physics.title: Work, Energy and Power
Physics.concepts: Work computations by constant/variable forces, kinetic energy, Work-Energy theorem, potential energy of springs, conservative forces, and vertical circular motion.

Physics.title: System of Particles & Rotation
Physics.concepts: Center of mass equations, torque, angular momentum, conservation of angular momentum, equilibrium of rigid bodies, and moments of inertia configurations.

Physics.title: Gravitation
Physics.concepts: Kepler's planetary laws, Newton's universal law of gravitation, variation of '$g$' with altitude/depth, escape speed thresholds, and satellite orbital velocity.

Physics.title: Mechanical Properties of Solids
Physics.concepts: Elastic behavior of matter, stress-strain curves, Hooke's Law, Young's Modulus, Bulk Modulus, Shear Modulus of rigidity, and elastic potential energy.

Physics.title: Mechanical Properties of Fluids
Physics.concepts: Pascal's law applications, hydraulic lifts, viscosity thresholds, Stokes' law, terminal velocity, streamline vs turbulent flow patterns, and Bernoulli's equation.

Physics.title: Thermal Properties of Matter
Physics.concepts: Thermal expansion profiles, specific heat capacities, calorimetry parameters, latent heat values, heat transfer loops, and Stefan-Boltzmann rules.

Physics.title: Thermodynamics
Physics.concepts: Thermal equilibrium states, Zeroth law, First Law of thermodynamics (internal energy/enthalpy), isothermal vs adiabatic expansions, and Second Law parameters.

Physics.title: Kinetic Theory
Physics.concepts: Equation of state of perfect gases, kinetic interpretation of temperature, RMS speed calculations, degrees of freedom, and law of equipartition of energy.

Physics.title: Oscillations
Physics.concepts: Periodic vs oscillatory motions, simple harmonic motion (S.H.M.) equations, phase indicators, spring loading variables, and kinetic/potential energy in S.H.M.

Physics.title: Waves
Physics.concepts: Longitudinal and transverse wave tracking, displacement relations for traveling waves, superposition principles, string reflection loops, and beat frequencies.

Chemistry.title: Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry
Chemistry.concepts: Importance of chemistry, laws of chemical combination, Dalton's atomic theory, atomic/molecular masses, mole concept, empirical formulas, and stoichiometry.

Chemistry.title: Structure of Atom
Chemistry.concepts: Subatomic particles, Bohr’s atomic model limits, de Broglie's wave duality, Heisenberg's uncertainty principle, quantum numbers, orbital shapes, and electron filling rules.

Chemistry.title: Classification of Elements
Chemistry.concepts: Modern periodic law, development of the periodic table layout, and periodic trends in properties (atomic/ionic radii, ionization enthalpy, electron gain, electronegativity).

Chemistry.title: Chemical Bonding
Chemistry.concepts: Ionic vs covalent bonds, bond parameters, Lewis representations, VSEPR molecular geometry theory, hybridization ($s, p, d$), Molecular Orbital theory, and hydrogen bonding.

Chemistry.title: Chemical Thermodynamics
Chemistry.concepts: Systems, surroundings, state functions, First Law ($U, H$), specific heat, Hess’s law, enthalpy calculations, spontaneity indicators, entropy, and Gibbs free energy ($\Delta G$).

Chemistry.title: Equilibrium
Chemistry.concepts: Dynamic physical/chemical equilibrium, law of mass action, Le Chatelier’s principle; ionic equilibrium, pH scales, buffer calculations, and solubility product.

Chemistry.title: Redox Reactions
Chemistry.concepts: Classical and electron transfer models of oxidation/reduction, oxidation number calculations, and balancing redox reactions by ion-electron/oxidation state codes.

Chemistry.title: Organic Chemistry: Core Principles
Chemistry.concepts: Purification methods, IUPAC nomenclature systems, inductive, electromeric, resonance, and hyperconjugation electronic effects; free radicals, and reaction mechanisms.

Chemistry.title: Hydrocarbons
Chemistry.concepts: Classification, isomerism, alkane conformations, chemical properties (halogenation, ozonolysis, electrophilic additions for alkenes/alkynes, aromatic substitution).

Biology.title: The Living World
Biology.concepts: Biodiversity tracking, taxonomy and systematics structures, taxonomic hierarchy levels, and binomial nomenclature regulations.

Biology.title: Biological Classification
Biology.concepts: Five-kingdom classification parameters; tracking salient characteristics of Monera, Protista, Fungi, alongside virus, viroid, and lichen profiles.

Biology.title: Plant Kingdom
Biology.concepts: Classification matrices of Algae, Bryophytes, Pteridophytes, Gymnosperms, and Angiosperms, detailing lifecycle alternation of generations.

Biology.title: Animal Kingdom
Biology.concepts: Structuring non-chordate phyla level characteristics and chordate classifications up to class parameters without speciment display.

Biology.title: Morphology of Flowering Plants
Biology.concepts: Structural mapping of root, stem, leaf, inflorescence, flower whorls, fruit types, and seed categories (Solanaceae family deep-dive).

Biology.title: Anatomy of Flowering Plants
Biology.concepts: Microscopic identification of tissue system distributions in dicotyledonous and monocotyledonous root, stem, and leaf networks.

Biology.title: Structural Organisation in Animals
Biology.concepts: Animal tissue distributions (epithelial, connective, muscular, neural); anatomy and functional loops of organ systems inside Frogs.

Biology.title: Cell: The Unit of Life
Biology.concepts: Prokaryotic vs eukaryotic cell envelopes, plasma systems, cell walls, endomembrane assemblies, mitochondria, plastids, and chromosome structures.

Biology.title: Biomolecules
Biology.concepts: Chemical analysis of cellular proteins, carbohydrates, lipids, nucleic acids, and enzyme action kinematics/classification.

Biology.title: Cell Cycle and Cell Division
Biology.concepts: Sequencing steps of the cell cycle; structural phases and genetic significance of Mitosis and Meiosis cell divisions.

Biology.title: Photosynthesis in Higher Plants
Biology.concepts: Photochemical vs biosynthetic tracks, cyclic/non-cyclic photophosphorylation, chemiosmotic steps, photorespiration, and $C_3/C_4$ pathways.

Biology.title: Respiration in Plants
Biology.concepts: Cellular gas distributions: Glycolysis pathways, anaerobic fermentation setups, TCA cycle (Krebs), Electron Transport System (ETS), and ATP tallying.

Biology.title: Plant Growth & Development
Biology.concepts: Phases of growth, differentiation/dedifferentiation loops, and mapping plant growth regulators (auxins, gibberellins, cytokinins, ethylene, ABA).

Biology.title: Breathing and Exchange of Gases
Biology.concepts: Human respiratory tract mechanics, breathing regulation models, gas partial pressure exchanges, transport of $O_2/CO_2$, and asthma/emphysema defects.

Biology.title: Body Fluids and Circulation
Biology.concepts: Blood composition, clotting cascades, lymph properties, human heart anatomy, cardiac cycle, ECG segments, and coronary defects.

Biology.title: Excretory Products & Elimination
Biology.concepts: Human nephron structures, ultrafiltration mechanisms, reabsorption/secretion paths, counter-current multipliers, and dialysis protocols.

Biology.title: Locomotion and Movement
Biology.concepts: Muscle fiber structures, sliding filament contraction mechanisms, human skeletal system map, types of joints, and gout/tetany disorders.

Biology.title: Neural Control & Coordination
Biology.concepts: Neuron structure, nerve impulse propagation mechanisms, central nervous system (CNS) layout, reflex actions, and sensory setups.

Biology.title: Chemical Coordination
Biology.concepts: Endocrine glands, tracking hormone target sites, hypo/hyper-secretions, and mechanism charts of hormone actions (peptide/steroid pathways).

Accountancy.title: Theoretical Framework
Accountancy.concepts: Introduction to accounting, basic terminologies, GAAP, accounting principles, assumptions, accounting standards, and GST basics.

Accountancy.title: Accounting Process
Accountancy.concepts: Recording transactions (Journal, Cashbook, Ledger), Bank Reconciliation Statements (BRS), Trial Balances, Depreciation calculations, and Rectification of Errors.

Accountancy.title: Financial Statements (Proprietor)
Accountancy.concepts: Constructing Trading, Profit and Loss Accounts, Balance Sheets with adjustments, and accounts from Incomplete Records (Statement of Affairs).

Business Studies.title: Evolution and Fundamentals
Business Studies.concepts: History of trade in India, nature and purpose of business, risk factors, and basic economic activities.

Business Studies.title: Forms of Business Organisations
Business Studies.concepts: Sole Proprietorship, Joint Hindu Family, Partnership models, Cooperative societies, and Joint Stock Company formation pipelines.

Business Studies.title: Public, Private & Global Enterprises
Business Studies.concepts: Departmental undertakings, Statutory Corporations, Government companies, and tracking Multinational Corporations (MNCs).

Business Studies.title: Business Services
Business Studies.concepts: Banking utilities (types of accounts/remittances), Insurance principles (Life, Fire, Marine), and warehousing logistical systems.

Business Studies.title: Emerging Modes of Business
Business Studies.concepts: E-business operational frameworks, scope, safety checks, and online outsourcing methods (BPO/KPO systems).

Business Studies.title: Social Responsibility & Ethics
Business Studies.concepts: Business ethics metrics, pollution control tracking, and responsibilities towards consumers, employees, and investors.

Business Studies.title: Sources of Business Finance
Business Studies.concepts: Retained earnings, equity shares, preference distributions, debentures, loans, and international finance avenues (ADR, GDR).

Business Studies.title: Small Business & Enterprises
Business Studies.concepts: MSME classifications, role of small setups in rural economies, government assistance programs, and startup development.

Business Studies.title: Internal Trade
Business Studies.concepts: Wholesale vs retail distribution lines, large-scale retail methods (Departmental stores, Mail order), and GST compliance.

Business Studies.title: International Trade
Business Studies.concepts: Export/Import documentation steps (Bill of Lading, Letter of Credit), WTO functionalities, and international trade bodies.

Economics.title: Introduction to Stats
Economics.concepts: Meaning, scope, functions, and high-weightage importance of statistics within macroeconomic planning architectures.

Economics.title: Data Collection & Presentation
Economics.concepts: Sampling vs Census tools, questionnaire patterns, tabular sorting, and plotting geometric/frequency graphs.

Economics.title: Statistical Tools & Interpretation
Economics.concepts: Computing Arithmetic Mean, Median, and Mode; Karl Pearson’s correlation metrics, and Index Numbers (inflation/wholesale tracking).

Economics.title: Introduction to Micro
Economics.concepts: Micro vs Macro boundaries, positive vs normative scopes, central problems of economies, and Production Possibility Frontier (PPF) trends.

Economics.title: Consumer Equilibrium & Demand
Economics.concepts: Utility analysis, Indifference Curve laws, price lines, demand schedules, and calculating Price Elasticity of Demand.

Economics.title: Producer Behaviour & Supply
Economics.concepts: Production function laws (Short-run returns), explicit/implicit costs, total/marginal revenues, and supply elasticity curves.

Economics.title: Forms of Market & Pricing
Economics.concepts: Perfect competition traits, price determination under equilibrium, and impacts of Price Ceilings and Price Floors.

History.title: The Three Orders
History.concepts: Changing traditions between the 9th-16th centuries; exploring Western European feudal systems, the Nobility, Clergy, and Peasantry.

History.title: Changing Cultural Traditions
History.concepts: European Renaissance timelines; evaluating breakthroughs in fine arts, humanism shifts, printing presses, and the Reformation.

History.title: Displacing Indigenous Peoples
History.concepts: European settlements in America and Australia; tracking frontier history lines and the displacement of native populations.

History.title: Paths to Modernisation
History.concepts: Comparing East Asian development styles; tracing Japan's rapid industrialization and China's transformation pathways.

Geography.title: Geography as a Discipline
Geography.concepts: Geography as an integrating, empirical, and spatial discipline; checking branches of physical and human geography.

Geography.title: The Earth
Geography.concepts: Origin and evolution theories of the Earth; internal crust/mantle structural properties, earthquakes, volcanoes, and continental drift.

Geography.title: Landforms
Geography.concepts: Rocks classification (igneous, sedimentary, metamorphic), weathering agents, geomorphic processes, and erosion landscapes.

Geography.title: Climate
Geography.concepts: Composition and layers of the atmosphere, insulation metrics, global wind belts, cyclonic storms, and planetary heat budgets.

Geography.title: Water (Oceans)
Geography.concepts: Hydrological cycles, ocean floor configurations, temperature/salinity profiles, ocean waves, tides, and marine current loops.

Geography.title: India: Physical Environment
Geography.concepts: Size, location vectors, geological divisions, monsoonal drainage systems, tropical vegetation zones, and natural hazard fields.

English.title: Core Prose Chapters
English.concepts: Reading comprehension, tone parsing, and vocabulary tracking for pieces like The Portrait of a Lady, Discovering Tut, and Silk Road.

English.title: Core Poems Matrix
English.concepts: Analyzing rhyme, poetic syntax, and imagery inside A Photograph, The Laburnum Top, The Voice of the Rain, Childhood, and Father to Son.

English.title: Supplementary Fiction
English.concepts: Character sketch evaluations and interpretation of supplementary works like The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse and The Address.

English.title: Note-Making & Composition
English.concepts: Formatting summaries, structured Note-making, compiling public posters, advertisements, speech outlines, and debate texts.

English.title: Advanced Grammar Formats
English.concepts: Tense corrections, relative clauses, active-passive structural rearrangements, and reordering jumbled phrase syntax.

Hindi.title: पाठ्यपुस्तक अध्याय
Hindi.concepts: मुंशी प्रेमचंद, कृष्णा सोबती व अन्य दिग्गजों की गद्य रचनाएँ; कबीर, मीरा के पदों का साहित्यिक भावार्थ और भाषा शैली का सघन अभ्यास।

Hindi.title: पूरक अध्याय
Hindi.concepts: भारतीय गायिकाओं में बेजोड़: लता मंगेशकर, राजस्थान की रजत बूँदें व अन्य सांस्कृतिक रचनाओं का संस्मरण व व्याख्या अभ्यास।

Hindi.title: जनसंचार व अनुप्रयुक्त लेखन
Hindi.concepts: जनसंचार माध्यमों की कार्यप्रणाली, पत्रकारीय लेखन के रूप, डायरी लिखने की कला, कथा-पटकथा संरचना और कार्यालयी लेखन।

Maths.title: Relations and Functions
Maths.concepts: Types of relations: reflexive, symmetric, transitive, and equivalence relations; one-to-one and onto functions.

Maths.title: Inverse Trigonometric Functions
Maths.concepts: Definition, range, domain, principal value branch, and basic graphs of inverse trigonometric functions.

Maths.title: Determinants
Maths.concepts: Determinant of a square matrix (up to $3 \times 3$), minors, cofactors, applications in area of triangles, adjoint/inverse of a matrix, and solving linear systems using matrix inversion.

Maths.title: Continuity & Differentiability
Maths.concepts: Continuity and differentiability, derivative of composite functions, chain rule, implicit functions, inverse trig derivatives, exponential/logarithmic functions, and second-order derivatives.

Maths.title: Application of Derivatives
Maths.concepts: Applications of derivatives: rate of change of bodies, increasing/decreasing functions, maxima and minima (first and second derivative tests with real problems).

Maths.title: Integrals
Maths.concepts: Integration as inverse of differentiation; integration by substitution, partial fractions, and parts; evaluating fundamental definite integrals $\int_{a}^{b} f(x) dx$.

Maths.title: Application of Integrals
Maths.concepts: Applications in finding the area under simple curves, especially lines, circles, parabolas, and ellipses (in standard forms).

Maths.title: Differential Equations
Maths.concepts: Definition, order, and degree; general and particular solutions; solving homogeneous and linear differential equations of the form: $\frac{dy}{dx} + P y = Q$.

Maths.title: Vector Algebra
Maths.concepts: Vectors and scalars, magnitude and direction, direction cosines/ratios, types of vectors, position vectors, scalar (dot) product, and vector (cross) product.

Maths.title: Three-Dimensional Geometry
Maths.concepts: Direction cosines and direction ratios of a line joining two points; Cartesian and vector equations of a line, coplanar lines, and shortest distance between two lines.

Maths.title: Linear Programming
Maths.concepts: Introduction, mathematical formulation of L.P. problems, graphical solution method for problems in two variables, feasible/infeasible regions, and optimal feasible solutions.

Maths.title: Probability
Maths.concepts: Conditional probability, multiplication theorem on probability, independent events, Total Probability theorem, Bayes' Theorem, and Random variable probability distributions.

Physics.title: Electric Charges and Fields
Physics.concepts: Electric charge, conservation, Coulomb's law, electric field, field lines, electric dipole, electric flux, Gauss's Law statement, and applications to infinitely long straight wires and uniformly charged thin spherical shells.

Physics.title: Electrostatic Potential & Capacitance
Physics.concepts: Electric potential, potential difference, potential due to a point charge/dipole, equipotential surfaces, conductors, dielectrics, capacitors, and capacitance of parallel plate units.

Physics.title: Current Electricity
Physics.concepts: Electric current, drift velocity, Ohm's law, electrical resistance, $V-I$ characteristics, temperature dependence, internal resistance of cells, Kirchhoff's laws, and Wheatstone bridge mechanics.

Physics.title: Moving Charges and Magnetism
Physics.concepts: Biot-Savart law applications, Ampere's law loops, force on moving charges in magnetic fields, straight current wires, cyclotron limits, torque on current loops, and moving coil galvanometers.

Physics.title: Magnetism and Matter
Physics.concepts: Current loops as magnetic dipoles, magnetic dipole moments, bar magnets, magnetic field lines, Earth's magnetic elements, and properties of dia-, para-, and ferromagnetic substances.

Physics.title: Electromagnetic Induction
Physics.concepts: Faraday's laws of induction, induced EMF and current, Lenz's Law, eddy currents, self-induction, and mutual induction parameters.

Physics.title: Alternating Current
Physics.concepts: Peak and RMS values of alternating current/voltage; reactance, impedance, LCR series circuits, resonance, power in AC circuits, wattless current, AC generators, and transformers.

Physics.title: Electromagnetic Waves
Physics.concepts: Displacement current basis, electromagnetic wave characteristics, transverse nature, and the electromagnetic spectrum (radio waves to gamma rays) with utility ranges.

Physics.title: Ray Optics & Optical Instruments
Physics.concepts: Refraction at spherical surfaces, lenses, thin lens formula, lens maker's formula, magnification, power, refraction through prisms, scattering, optical microscope, and astronomical telescopes.

Physics.title: Wave Optics
Physics.concepts: Wavefront configurations, Huygens' principle, refraction/reflection of plane waves, light wave interference, Young's double slit experiment, expression for fringe width, and diffraction layouts.

Physics.title: Dual Nature of Radiation & Matter
Physics.concepts: Photoelectric effect, Hertz and Lenard's observations, Einstein's photoelectric equation, particle nature of light, matter waves, and the de Broglie relation.

Physics.title: Atoms
Physics.concepts: Alpha-particle scattering experiment, Rutherford's nuclear model of atom, Bohr model of hydrogen atom, energy levels, and hydrogen line spectra transitions.

Physics.title: Nuclei
Physics.concepts: Composition and size of nucleus, nuclear mass, mass defect, binding energy per nucleon variations, nuclear fission, and nuclear fusion processes.

Physics.title: Semiconductor Electronics
Physics.concepts: Energy bands in solids, intrinsic vs extrinsic semiconductors ($p$-type, $n$-type), $p-n$ junction behaviors, forward/reverse bias, $p-n$ junction diode as rectifiers, and logic gates ($OR, AND, NOT, NAND, NOR$).

Chemistry.title: Solutions
Chemistry.concepts: Types of solutions, expression of concentration of solutions, solubility of gases in liquids (Henry's law), Raoult's law, ideal/non-ideal solutions, and colligative properties (van 't Hoff factor).

Chemistry.title: Electrochemistry
Chemistry.concepts: Redox reactions, conductance in electrolytic solutions, specific and molar conductivity, Kohlrausch's Law, electrolysis, galvanic cells, Nernst equation, and fuel cells.

Chemistry.title: Chemical Kinetics
Chemistry.concepts: Rate of a reaction (average and instantaneous), factors affecting rates, order and molecularity of a reaction, rate law, integrated rate equations for zero/first-order reactions, and collision theory.

Chemistry.title: d- and f-Block Elements
Chemistry.concepts: General introduction, electronic configuration, occurrence and characteristics of transition metals, oxidation states, ionic radii, color, catalytic properties, magnetic properties, and lanthanoids/actinoids.

Chemistry.title: Coordination Compounds
Chemistry.concepts: Introduction, ligands, coordination number, color, magnetic properties, IUPAC nomenclature, isomerism, Werner's theory, Valence Bond Theory (VBT), and Crystal Field Theory (CFT).

Chemistry.title: Haloalkanes and Haloarenes
Chemistry.concepts: Nomenclature, nature of $C-X$ bond, physical and chemical properties, mechanism of substitution reactions ($S_N1$ and $S_N2$), polyhalogen compounds, and environmental impacts.

Chemistry.title: Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers
Chemistry.concepts: Nomenclature, methods of preparation, physical and chemical properties, mechanism of dehydration of alcohols, electrophilic substitution in phenols, and uses.

Chemistry.title: Aldehydes, Ketones & Carboxylic Acids
Chemistry.concepts: Nomenclature, nature of carbonyl group, methods of preparation, physical and chemical properties, mechanism of nucleophilic addition, and acidity of carboxylic acids.

Chemistry.title: Amines
Chemistry.concepts: Nomenclature, classification, structure, methods of preparation, physical and chemical properties, basic strength of amines, and synthetic uses of diazonium salts.

Chemistry.title: Biomolecules
Chemistry.concepts: Carbohydrates (classification, monosaccharides, glucose, fructose), Proteins (amino acids, peptide bonds, primary/secondary structures), Nucleic acids ($DNA/RNA$), and Vitamins.

Biology.title: Sexual Reproduction in Flowers
Biology.concepts: Flower structure, development of male and female gametophytes, pollination types, double fertilization, seed development, fruit formation, apomixis, and polyembryony.

Biology.title: Human Reproduction
Biology.concepts: Male and female reproductive systems, microscopic anatomy of testis/ovary, gametogenesis (spermatogenesis & oogenesis), menstrual cycle, fertilization, blastocyst formation, pregnancy, and lactation.

Biology.title: Reproductive Health
Biology.concepts: Need for reproductive health and prevention of STDs; birth control methods, contraception, medical termination of pregnancy (MTP), amniocentesis, and infertility assisted technologies ($IVF, ZIFT, GIFT$).

Biology.title: Principles of Inheritance & Variation
Biology.concepts: Mendelian inheritance, deviations from Mendelism (incomplete dominance, co-dominance, multiple alleles), polygenic inheritance, chromosome theory, sex determination, and Mendelian/chromosomal disorders.

Biology.title: Molecular Basis of Inheritance
Biology.concepts: Search for genetic material, structure of $DNA$ and $RNA$, $DNA$ packaging, $DNA$ replication, transcription, genetic code, translation, gene expression regulation (Lac Operon), and $DNA$ fingerprinting.

Biology.title: Evolution
Biology.concepts: Origin of life, biological evolution, evidences for evolution (paleontological, comparative anatomy, embryology), Darwin's contribution, Modern Synthetic theory, Hardy-Weinberg principle, and human evolution.

Biology.title: Human Health and Disease
Biology.concepts: Pathogens and parasites causing human diseases (Malaria, Filariasis, Ascariasis, Typhoid, Pneumonia, Ringworm); immunology principles, vaccines, Cancer, HIV/AIDS, and drug/alcohol abuse.

Biology.title: Microbes in Human Welfare
Biology.concepts: Microbes in household food processing, industrial production, sewage treatment, energy generation (biogas), as biocontrol agents, and biofertilizers.

Biology.title: Biotechnology: Principles & Processes
Biology.concepts: Genetic engineering technologies; recombinant $DNA$ technology steps, restriction enzymes, cloning vectors, PCR amplification, and downstream processing.

Biology.title: Biotechnology & Applications
Biology.concepts: Applications in agriculture (Bt cotton, pest-resistant plants), medicine (genetically engineered insulin, gene therapy, molecular diagnosis), transgenic animals, and biosafety/biopiracy issues.

Biology.title: Organisms and Populations
Biology.concepts: Organisms and environment: niche concepts, population attributes, population growth curves, and population interactions (mutualism, competition, predation, parasitism).

Biology.title: Ecosystem
Biology.concepts: Ecosystem structure and function; productivity, decomposition, energy flow streams, ecological pyramids, ecological succession, and ecosystem services.

Biology.title: Biodiversity and Conservation
Biology.concepts: Concept and patterns of biodiversity, importance of biodiversity, loss of biodiversity, and conservation strategies (in-situ and ex-situ protections).

Accountancy.title: Accounting for Partnership Firms
Accountancy.concepts: Partnership deeds, provisions of Indian Partnership Act 1932, Profit & Loss Appropriation accounts, partner capital accounts (fixed vs fluctuating), interest treatments, and goodwill valuation methods.

Accountancy.title: Reconstitution and Dissolution
Accountancy.concepts: Accounting for changes in profit-sharing ratios, admission of a partner, retirement/death profiles, revaluation accounts, and complete dissolution settlement accounts.

Accountancy.title: Accounting for Companies
Accountancy.concepts: Accounting for Share Capital (issue, allotment, over-subscription, forfeiture, re-issue of shares) and accounting for Debentures (issue, terms of redemption, collateral securities).

Accountancy.title: Analysis of Financial Statements
Accountancy.concepts: Financial statements of a company (Statement of Profit and Loss & Balance Sheet templates), tools for analysis, accounting ratios (liquidity, solvency, turnover, profitability), and Cash Flow Statements ($AS-3$).

Business Studies.title: Nature & Significance of Management
Business Studies.concepts: Management as science, art, and profession; levels of management, management objectives, and core coordination functions.

Business Studies.title: Principles of Management
Business Studies.concepts: Henri Fayol’s 14 principles of management vs F.W. Taylor’s scientific management rules, techniques, and functional foremanship.

Business Studies.title: Business Environment
Business Studies.concepts: Dimensions of business environment (Economic, Social, Technological, Political, Legal) and the impact of economic reforms.

Business Studies.title: Planning
Business Studies.concepts: Concept, importance, limitations, and planning process steps; types of plans (objectives, strategies, policies, procedures, budgets).

Business Studies.title: Organizing
Business Studies.concepts: Concept, process, organizational structures (functional vs divisional), formal vs informal organizations, delegation elements, and decentralization.

Business Studies.title: Staffing
Business Studies.concepts: Concept, staffing as a part of human resource management, recruitment sources, selection processes, training and development methods.

Business Studies.title: Directing
Business Studies.concepts: Elements of directing: supervision, motivation theories (Maslow's hierarchy), leadership styles (autocratic, democratic, laissez-faire), and communication barriers.

Business Studies.title: Controlling
Business Studies.concepts: Concept, importance, relationship between planning and controlling, and steps in the management control process.

Business Studies.title: Financial Management
Business Studies.concepts: Role of financial management, investment, financing, and dividend decisions; financial planning, capital structure, and fixed/working capital variables.

Business Studies.title: Financial Markets
Business Studies.concepts: Money market instruments (Treasury bills, Commercial paper) vs Capital markets (Primary and Secondary markets, NSE, BSE, and SEBI regulations).

Business Studies.title: Marketing Management
Business Studies.concepts: Marketing philosophies, functions of marketing, and marketing mix elements ($4\text{Ps}$: Product, Price, Place, Promotion).

Business Studies.title: Consumer Protection
Business Studies.concepts: Importance of consumer protection, Consumer Protection Act 2019 legal rights, consumer responsibilities, and redressal machinery forums.

Economics.title: National Income & Aggregates
Economics.concepts: Circular flow of income, aggregates ($GDP, GNP, NDP, NNP$ at market price and factor cost), and methods of calculating national income (Product, Income, and Expenditure methods).

Economics.title: Money and Banking
Economics.concepts: Money functions, commercial banking system credit creation processes, and functions of the Central Bank (RBI) using quantitative/qualitative controls.

Economics.title: Determination of Income & Employment
Economics.concepts: Aggregate demand, aggregate supply, propensity to consume/save, short-run equilibrium output, investment multiplier mechanics, and corrections for excess/deficient demand.

Economics.title: Government Budget & Economy
Economics.concepts: Objectives, components of government budgets (classification of receipts and expenditure), and measures of government deficits (revenue, fiscal, primary).

Economics.title: Balance of Payments & FX
Economics.concepts: Balance of Payments account meanings and components; foreign exchange market fixed vs flexible rate systems, and managed floating determination trends.

Economics.title: Development Experience (1947-90)
Economics.concepts: State of the Indian economy on the eve of independence, common goals of five-year plans, agricultural land reforms, green revolution, and industrial policies ($IPR\ 1956$).

Economics.title: Economic Reforms Since 1991
Economics.concepts: Need for New Economic Policy; LPG features (Liberalization, Privatization, Globalization), and appraisals of WTO and economic reform impacts.

Economics.title: Current Challenges (Indian Economy)
Economics.concepts: Human capital formation trends, rural development vectors, sustainable economic growth, employment patterns, and environmental threats.

Economics.title: Comparative Development Profiles
Economics.concepts: Comparative metrics mapping India, Pakistan, and China across growth metrics, demographic curves, sectoral shifts, and human development rankings.

History.title: Archaeology & Ancient India
History.concepts: Themes 1 to 4: Harappan Urban Civilization (Bricks, Beads and Bones); Early Political/Economic Empires (Kings, Farmers and Towns); Social Histories (Kinship, Caste and Class); and Cultural Developments (Thinkers, Beliefs and Buildings).

History.title: Medieval India
History.concepts: Themes 5 to 8: Accounts of travelers (Al-Biruni, Ibn Battuta, François Bernier); Bhakti-Sufi transformations; Architecture of the Vijayanagara Empire; and Agrarian relationships under the Mughals.

History.title: Modern India
History.concepts: Themes 9 to 11: Colonialism and the countryside (revenue settlements); the 1857 Revolt (Rebels and the Raj); Mahatma Gandhi and the Civil Disobedience Nationalist Movements; and Framing the Indian Constitution.

Geography.title: Fundamentals of Human Geo
Geography.concepts: Human geography nature and scope; global population distribution, density, and growth trends; human development indexing; primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary economic activity frameworks; and global transport/trade corridors.

Geography.title: India: People and Economy
Geography.concepts: Population dynamics across states; migration types and consequences; human settlements classification; water resource management, mineral/energy deposits, planning strategies, and environmental pollution issues.

English.title: Board Prose Chapters
English.concepts: Advanced reading comprehension, thematic analysis, and author intent tracking for core pieces including The Last Lesson, Lost Spring, Deep Water, The Rattrap, Indigo, Poets and Pancakes, The Interview, and Going Places.

English.title: Board Poems Matrix
English.concepts: Technical analysis of poetic devices, metaphors, and rhyme parameters inside My Mother at Sixty-Six, Keeping Quiet, A Thing of Beauty, A Roadside Stand, and Aunt Jennifer's Tigers.

English.title: Supplementary Fiction
English.concepts: Character arcs, complex plots, and moral conflict tracking in pieces including The Third Level, The Tiger King, Journey to the End of the Earth, The Enemy, On the Face of It, and Memories of Childhood.

English.title: Advanced Writing Skills
English.concepts: Strict professional layouts for drafting formal Short Notices, Invitations (Formal/Informal) and replies, Letters to Editors, Job Applications with resumes, Article writing, and Report compilation.

English.title: Applied Syntax Portfolio
English.concepts: Integrated clause restructuring, active-to-passive transformation, direct-to-indirect narrative conversions, and syntax error detection frameworks within text blocks.

Hindi.title: मुख्य साहित्य विधाएँ
Hindi.concepts: हरिवंश राय बच्चन, तुलसीदास, सूर्यकांत त्रिपाठी निराला की कविताओं का आलोचनात्मक भावार्थ; महादेवी वर्मा (भक्तिन), जैनेंद्र कुमार (बाज़ार दर्शन) के गद्य खंडों की गहन व्याख्या व समीक्षा।

Hindi.title: पूरक गद्य खंड
Hindi.concepts: मनोहर श्याम जोशी की प्रसिद्ध रचना 'सिल्वर वैडिंग', आनंद यादव की 'जूझ', और 'अतीत में दबे पाँव' के माध्यम से संस्मरणात्मक गद्य, आंचलिक जीवन और ऐतिहासिक यात्रा वृतांतों का बोध।

Hindi.title: जनसंचार एवं व्यावहारिक व्याकरण
Hindi.concepts: जनसंचार माध्यमों की भाषा, समाचार लेखन का प्रारूप (उल्टा पिरामिड शैली), फीचर लेखन, स्तंभ लेखन, विशेष रिपोर्ट तैयार करना, कार्यालयी पत्र, और कार्यसूची (Agenda) निर्माण।
